headline: Earnings Preview: A.O. Smith (AOS) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: A.O. Smith (AOS) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
